criteria.description: WP01 mission artifacts, API contract, data model, quickstart, task outline and work package prompts are complete and reviewed.
criteria.evidence: WP01 approved after tasks.md was normalized and finalize-tasks validation passed.
criteria.notes: Recorded in WP01 activity log, status events and acceptance artifacts.

criteria.description: WP02 backend related-products endpoint is implemented with active-only filtering, current-product exclusion, same-category priority, fallback fill, limit of 4 and 404 behavior.
criteria.evidence: docker compose exec backend python manage.py check and docker compose exec backend python manage.py test apps.products passed.
criteria.notes: WP02 was adopted from the existing implementation and approved after backend validation.

criteria.description: WP03 frontend product gallery, thumbnail switching, related-products grid and non-blocking related-load failure behavior are implemented and reviewed.
criteria.evidence: docker compose exec frontend npm test -- --runInBand, npm run lint and npm run build passed.
criteria.notes: WP03 was adopted from the existing implementation and approved after frontend validation.

criteria.description: Mission-level backend and frontend validation gates passed before acceptance.
criteria.evidence: docker compose exec backend python manage.py test passed with 97 tests; backend check, frontend tests, lint and build were green.
criteria.notes: Backend test output included non-blocking JWT key length warnings only.
